leadText: The Energy Powder (Japanese: ちからのこな Energy Powder), formatted EnergyPowder prior to Generation VI, is a type of medicine introduced in Generation II. It is a type of herbal medicine that restores a Pokémon's HP.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation II to VI [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it heals the Pokémon by 50 HP but lowers its friendship . It is consumed after use. Generation VII onward [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it heals the Pokémon by 60 HP but lowers its friendship . It is consumed after use.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C Restores Pok é mon HP by 50. Bitter. R S E Colo XD A bitter powder that restores HP by 50 points. FR LG A very bitter medicine powder. It restores the HP of one Pok é mon by 50 points. D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A very bitter medicine powder. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by 50 points. X Y OR AS A bitter medicine powder. When consumed, it restores 50 HP to an injured Pokémon. S M US UM P E A very bitter medicinal powder. When consumed, it restores up to 60 HP to an injured Pokémon. Sw Sh BD SP LA A very bitter medicinal powder. It can be used to restore 60 HP to a single Pokémon. S V ZA A very bitter medicinal powder. It can be used to restore 60 HP to a Pokémon.
